1.q: I am the most abundant element in the universe.
I fuel the Sun through nuclear fusion.

2.q: I am used to fill party balloons.
I make your voice sound high-pitched.
I am a noble gas that does not burn.

3.q: I am used in rechargeable batteries.

4.q: I am used in emeralds and aquamarines.
I am a lightweight metal used in satellites.

5.q: I am found in Borax and slime recipes.
I am used to make green fireworks.

6.q: I am the 'Building Block of Life'.
Graphite in pencils is made of me.

7.q: I make up 78% of Earth's atmosphere.

8.q: Humans need to breathe me to survive.
I make up 21% of the atmosphere.

9.q: I am added to toothpaste to prevent cavities.
I am the most reactive non-metal.

10.q: I glow red-orange in electric signs.

11.q: I am the metal part of table salt.
I explode if thrown in water.

12.q: I burn with a blinding white light.
I am found in chlorophyll in plants.

13.q: I am used to make soda cans and foil.
I am a metal that doesn't rust easily.

14.q: I am the main ingredient in computer chips.
I am found in sand and glass.

15.q: I am found in match heads.
I glow in the dark (in white form).

16.q: I am a yellow solid that smells like rotten eggs.
I am found in volcanic vents.

17.q: I am used in pools to kill bacteria.
I am a green poisonous gas.

18.q: I am the third most common gas in air.

19.q: I am essential for muscle function.

20.q: I am found in milk and chalk.

22.q: I am a super strong, lightweight metal.
I am used in artificial hips and aerospace.

26.q: I am the main metal in steel.
I turn red when I rust.

28.q: I am used in coins and stainless steel.

29.q: I am used in electrical wires.
I turn green when I oxidize (Statue of Liberty).

30.q: I am used to coat steel to stop rust (galvanizing).
